career_angle: AI agent engineering is the fastest-growing role in tech. If you can build reliable agent systems, you're in high demand.

factors.name: Source Authority
factors.rationale: 'MiniMax-M2.5: SOTA coding, search, toolcalls, $1/hour' -- AI News (smol.ai) is unclassified or low-reliability source (tier_5, reliability: 20%)

factors.name: Evidence Quality
factors.rationale: mentions benchmarks or datasets; specific figures cited: 'k scores like **80.2%', 't compute share (~60%', 'n agents with **77.8%'

factors.name: Conflict of Interest
factors.rationale: 'MiniMax-M2.5: SOTA coding, search, toolcalls, $1/hour' -- no overt promotional language from AI News (smol.ai), but independence not confirmed

factors.name: Consensus
factors.rationale: 'MiniMax-M2.5: SOTA coding, search, toolcalls, $1/hour' -- not cross-referenced against external expert consensus

factors.name: Specificity
factors.rationale: cites concrete figures: 'k scores like **80.2%', 't compute share (~60%', 'n agents with **77.8%'

factors.name: Track Record
factors.rationale: AI News (smol.ai) -- insufficient history to assess
